name: education_newsroom_s_automated_moderation_cedar_lib_eq
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education newsroom s automated moderation cedar lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Mira Petrov
agents.identity: I am Mira Petrov, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Luc Kim
agents.identity: I am Luc Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Mira Petrov must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Mira Petrov do?
